zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda de Cauz於大約1134年出生在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾謝爾福德時，她的父親Robert de Cauz35歲，母親Sibyl Basset10歲。她和Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin至少有3個兒子。她去世於1224年5月25日在英國諾廷加姆爾內瓦爾可--特倫特享年91歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cauz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Katz
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Isadore, Meyer, Moshe, Chaim, Emanuel, Aron, Mayer, Shoshana, Zev.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): acronymic surname from the first letters of the Hebrew phrase kohen tsedek ‘priest of righteousness’ (see Cohen ).
German: nickname from Katz(e) ‘cat’. See also English Catt , compare Catz and Kates .

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda de Cauz was born about 1134, in Shelford, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert de Cauz, was 35 and her mother, Sibyl Basset, was 10. She had at least 3 sons with Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin. She died on 25 May 1224, in Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 91.

Elle a eu au moins 3 fils avec Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin. Elle est décédée le 25 mai 1224, à Newark-on-Trent, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 91 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda de Cauz(이)가 대략 1134년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 셸퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Cauz(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sibyl Basset(은)는 10세였다. 그녀는 Adam FitzPeter Lord of Birkin(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1224년 5월 25일 영국 노틴그함실르 뉴아르k--트렌트에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda de Cauz родилась около 1134 г. в местности шелфорд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert de Cauz было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sibyl Basset, 10.
